The process in which someone or something grows or changes and becomes more advanced.

Learning new languages can reduce stress and make one healthier. ▲ 閱讀下文,回答第 38-41 題 The leopard cats are the only surviving native wild cat after the disappearance of the Formosan clouded leopard. They are roughly the size of housecats and live in Taiwan’s lower elevations of around 500 meters. Areas mixing wilderness with agriculture are particularly hospitable for them as rice fields provide ideal habitats for leopard cats’ favorite prey, such as field mice and other rodents. While the species is very common across a wide range of habitats from Pakistan to Siberia and the Indonesian archipelago, it is on the edge of extinction in Taiwan. It is estimated that there are less than 500 of them divided into three isolated populations in Miaoli, Taichung, and Nantou. Habitat destruction is the biggest threat to leopard cats. Road building and some development programs are destroying their habitat seriously. Two years ago, for example, construction began in a wetland park in Chuo Lan in the name of economic development, and yet it destroyed their natural habitat. Although the construction has stopped, it has already caused great damage. What’s worse, there are some other development projects besides the park. As for road building, the news that leopard cats have been killed in traffic accidents is not strange. Moreover, to hunt for survival, they often innocently and miserably fall victim to poisoning by chicken farm owners. Thus, wildlife biologists keep promoting raising chickens in coops and growing rice without pesticide. Luckily, the leopard cat population in Nantou seems to be more secure, as the local residents there have been long used to the presence of TESRI( 特有生物保育研究中心 ). Wildlife biologists are also discussing the potential for reintroducing the species into New Taipei City’s Feitsui Dam watershed. Hopefully, the species can have a better chance of thriving in Taiwan in the near future.
questions.explanation: 正解：(D)；來源：109-2-四技二專-00共同科目 英文解析.pdf

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 109-2-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: What is the main idea of the passage?
options: The importance of protecting wild animals.
Leopard cats’ influence on the environment.
A comparison of the species in different habitats.
The reasons for leopard cats’ becoming endangered in Taiwan.
questions.explanation: 正解：(D)；來源：109-2-四技二專-00共同科目 英文解析.pdf

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 109-2-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: According to the passage, which of the following statements about leopard cats is NOT true?
options: They are unlikely to be found in high-altitude mountains in Taiwan.
Besides chickens, they love to eat field mice and squirrels.
They travel around central Taiwan as well as New Taipei City.
Their habitats are getting smaller because of humans’ development.
questions.explanation: 根據這篇短文,下列哪一個關於石虎的敘述是不正確 標點錯誤。 的? 0 (2) 所有字詞組合錯誤。 (A) 牠們不可能在臺灣的高海拔山區被發現。 (3) 只抄引導文字、題目或其他試題。 (B) 除了雞之外,牠們也喜歡吃田鼠和松鼠。 (4) 空白 ( 未書寫文字 ) 。 (C) 牠們在中臺灣還有新北市活動。 (D) 因為人類的開發,牠們的棲息地越來越小。 III. 中譯英 本文第 1 段最後一句清楚提到:只有苗栗、臺中和南

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 109-2-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: According to the passage, which of the following statements is true?
options: Wildlife experts consider making Feitsui Dam watershed a new home to the leopard cats.
The chicken farm owners can’t keep their chickens safe without using poison.
The population of leopard cats in Nantou is not as secure as that in Miaoli.

If the habitats were not destroyed, there would be no threats to Taiwan’s leopard cats. 二、非選擇題 ( 第 I 到第 III 題,每題 6 分,共 18 分 ) I. 填充 說明: ▲請依據中文提示,將試題內空格  、  答案之完整單字 ( 含提示之字首 ),分別作答於答 案卷之作答欄  、  之指定範圍內以完成句子。 ▲請勿抄題,每格限填一字,超過一字者視為錯誤,不予計分。
questions.explanation: 根據這篇短文,下列哪一個敘述是正確的? regulations is very important / significant / vital. (A) 野生動物專家考慮讓翡翠水庫流域成為石虎的新 或 It is very important / significant / vital to follow / obey / 家。 observe the traffic rules / regulations. (B) 雞農不使用毒藥就無法確保雞隻的安全。 評閱指標 (C) 南投的石虎數量不像苗栗的那麼穩定。 級分 說明 (D) 如果牠們的棲息地沒有遭到破壞,那麼臺灣的石 能充分表達原文題意,文法、標點正確,用字 虎就沒有威脅了。 4 遣詞沒有不當之處。 本文第 3 段最後一句,專家們呼籲:以雞籠來養雞, 能適切表達原文題意,文法、標點、用字遣詞 就不需要用毒餌,可知 (B) 是錯的。最後一段第一句 3 僅有少數不當之處。 可知 (C) 是錯的。第 3 段提到雞農的用毒,還有農田 僅能部分表達原文題意,文法、標點、用字遣 的殺蟲劑 ( 農藥 ),都是棲息地被破壞之外的威脅,可 2 詞有多處失當之處。 知 (D) 是錯的。最後一段清楚提到專家們試著為石虎 無法表達原文題意,文法、標點、用字遣詞僅 尋找出路。故選 (A) 1 有少數正確之處。 二、非選擇題 (1) 空白 ( 未書寫文字 ) 。 (2) 文字瑣碎、形同未答。 I. 填充 0 (3) 只抄題目或其他試題。
